videos.headline: ECU seals their Military Bowl win with timely interception
videos.description: Dontavius Nash picks off CJ Bailey in the final minute, sealing ECU's Go Bowling Military Bowl victory

videos.headline: Katin Houser slips through the pocket for a 19-yard ECU TD
videos.description: Katin Houser puts East Carolina on the board with a rushing touchdown.

videos.headline: CJ Bailey finds Dacari Collins in stride for an NC State TD
videos.description: Dacari Collins catches the 7-yard pass from CJ Bailey, scoring NC State's first touchdown.

videos.headline: Katin Houser finds the end zone on another ECU rush
videos.description: Katin Houser brings in another East Carolina score with a 4-yard rushing touchdown.

videos.headline: Justin Joly hauls in a 15-yard NC State TD
videos.description: CJ Bailey floats it over to Justin Joly in the end zone as NC State claws back.

videos.headline: Katin Houser throws a costly interception for ECU in the final minutes
videos.description: Tamarcus Cooley picks of Katin Houser gaining momentum for NC State.

videos.headline: Rahjai Harris takes it to the house for an 86-yard ECU TD
videos.description: Rahjai Harris clutches up for ECU, running and dodging defenses to recapture the lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Rahjai Harris takes it to the house for an 86-yard ECU TD) 2024/12/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Referee bloodied after mass brawl between ECU, NC State
videos.description: Near the end of East Carolina and NC State's Go Bowling Military Bowl game, several players from each team get into it, leading to a referee sustaining a cut beneath an eye.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Referee bloodied after mass brawl between ECU, NC State) 2024/12/28 ESHEET
